title: Free Valentine's run/walk on Thursday
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Nedbank Running Club in...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Nedbank Running Club in Mossel Bay is hosting a free Valentine's run/walk this Thursday, 29 February, from 18:00.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Nedbank Running Club in Mossel Bay is hosting a free Valentine's run/walk this Thursday, 29 February, from 18:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The event takes place at Dias Beach, from the parking area. No costs are involved and competitors can complete a distance of 3km or 5km.","html":"The event takes place at Dias Beach, from the parking area. No costs are involved and competitors can complete a distance of 3km or 5km."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The event is open to everyone, not just club members. Dress in the colours of love. There will be prizes for the best dressed competitors as well as lucky draws and goody bags.","html":"The event is open to everyone, not just club members. Dress in the colours of love. There will be prizes for the best dressed competitors as well as lucky draws and goody bags."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information, call 060 802 7585 or email [email protected].","html":"For more information, call 060 802 7585 or email [email protected]."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news.","html":"We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news."}]
